title: 目標達成の後に・落星

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is over with Meisho
Doto successfully fulfilling all her goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But we're soon met with bad news. Admire Vega
must abstain from running due to inflammation in
her legs. Worse, there's no telling when she'll be
able to return.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O laments the situation, suggesting
that the only available option is to wait. The
ever-timid Doto, however, has another idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something awakens in her, and she resolves to be
stronger so that she can accompany Opera O
through the year's G1 races. Goal in mind, Doto
decides to try a G2—January's Nikkei Shinshun
Hai.
